{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=A turbine engine is added to this Snail Shell for greater power and speed!
|affct=TECH
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Chaos Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=0
|water=0
|fire=1
|wind=5
|form=Mecha
|element=Fire
|realm=Cathay
|orangehard=DEF
}}
